summary: Blocked before a buildable React on Rails Pro app could be completed. Rails scaffold was created under `eval_app`, local Ruby gems for `react_on_rails`, `react_on_rails_pro`, `shakapacker`, and `rspec-rails` were available and bundled locally, but required npm dependencies could not be installed because DNS resolution for `registry.npmjs.org` failed. No tests or production asset build were run successfully, so I cannot claim the scenario is satisfied. No PR was pushed because the repo has no git remote and the work is blocked/incomplete.
commands: npm view react-on-rails-pro@17.0.0-rc.9 version dependencies peerDependencies --json
npm view react-on-rails-rsc@19.2.1-rc.1 version dependencies peerDependencies --json
friction: Rails generator repeatedly attempted Rubygems network access and reported `Could not reach host index.rubygems.org`, but local gems allowed Bundler to resolve with `bundle install --local`.
React on Rails generator began generating Shakapacker/Rspack files but stalled during npm dependency installation.
NPM dependency installation failed with `getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND registry.npmjs.org`, including while fetching `prop-types` and `css-loader`.
`npm install` produced no `node_modules` or lockfile before being terminated.
Sandbox denied `.Codex/napkin.md` creation with `mkdir: .Codex: Operation not permitted`.
Sandbox denied process inspection with `operation not permitted: ps`.
No git remote is configured, so a PR could not be pushed even if the app had been completed.
blockers: Required public npm dependencies for React on Rails Pro/RSC cannot be installed because `registry.npmjs.org` DNS resolution fails with `getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND`.
